  • No Additional Cost: You pay nothing for repairs – parts, labor, and shipping included.
  • Coverage: Plan starts on the date of purchase. Drops, spills and cracked screens due to normal use are covered from day one. Malfunctions are covered after the manufacturer's warranty. Real experts are available 24/7 to help with set-up, connectivity issues, troubleshooting and much more.
  • Easy Claims Process: File a claim anytime online or by phone. Most claims approved within minutes. If we can’t repair it, we’ll send you an Amazon e-gift card for the purchase price of your covered product or replace it.
  • Product Eligibility: Plan must be purchased with a product or within 30 days of the product purchase. Pre-existing conditions are not covered.

from Asurion, LLC
4.1 7525
  • BEST VALUE: Protect all your eligible Amazon purchases including: tech, tools, appliances, furniture and more. All for one low monthly price.
  • ONE SIMPLE PROTECTION PLAN: Covers malfunctions and failures for eligible Amazon purchases, plus drops or spills for portable items. Protection begins immediately for eligible purchases from the past 90 days, plus all eligible future purchases (products used commercially are excluded).
  • CYBERSECURITY INCLUDED: Trusted digital security that keeps your devices and data safer. Includes scam detection for emails and texts ($89.99 in annual savings).
  • QUICK AND EASY CLAIMS: File in minutes at Asurion.com/amazon for fast repair or reimbursement - up to the purchase price.
  • NO HIDDEN FEES. CANCEL ANYTIME. You’re covered for up to $5,000 in total claims per 12-month period. Your plan renews monthly until canceled (coupons applied at checkout do not renew monthly).

  • No Additional Cost: You pay nothing for repairs – parts, labor, and shipping included.

Product Protection by Asurion, LLC

  • BEST VALUE: Protect all your eligible Amazon purchases including: tech, tools, appliances, furniture and more. All for one low monthly price.
  • ONE SIMPLE PROTECTION PLAN: Covers malfunctions and failures for eligible Amazon purchases, plus drops or spills for portable items. Protection begins immediately for eligible purchases from the past 90 days, plus all eligible future purchases (products used commercially are excluded).
  • CYBERSECURITY INCLUDED: Trusted digital security that keeps your devices and data safer. Includes scam detection for emails and texts ($89.99 in annual savings).
  • QUICK AND EASY CLAIMS: File in minutes at Asurion.com/amazon for fast repair or reimbursement - up to the purchase price.
  • NO HIDDEN FEES. CANCEL ANYTIME. You’re covered for up to $5,000 in total claims per 12-month period. Your plan renews monthly until canceled (coupons applied at checkout do not renew monthly).

Support
Product support included
What's Product Support?
In the event your product doesn't work as expected or you need help using it, Amazon offers free product support options such as live phone/chat with an Amazon associate, manufacturer contact information, step-by-step troubleshooting guides, and help videos. By solving product issues, we help the planet by extending the life of products. Availability of support options differ by product and country. Learn more
Payment
Secure transaction
Your transaction is secure
We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more

Available at checkout

      About this item

      • WHY GALAXY WATCH8 CLASSIC: Timeless design.* New lug system for easy band detachment & replacement.* Advanced health & sleep tracking features for total body wellness.* Improved user interface.* Personal AI assistant for hands free help.¹* 2-Yr Warranty
      • BUILT TO PERFORM. DESIGNED TO IMPRESS: Show off your style with an iconic design that blends tradition with cutting-edge innovation.¹ A brighter screen makes everything easy to see, and a rotating bezel gives you access to your favorite apps
      • YOUR EVERY COMMAND, RIGHT ON YOUR WRIST: Get a little extra help with day-to-day tasks. Galaxy Watch 8 Classic features a personal AI assistant¹ that helps you get things done hands-free. Simply speak the command and your Watch makes it happen
      • UNLOCK THE SECRETS TO BETTER SLEEP: When you get good sleep, it feels like anything is possible. Start each day with more energy and better focus using Advanced Sleep Coaching² - improved with even more ways to help you sleep smarter
      • QUICK UPDATES, AT A GLANCE: Get updates, select apps and more with Now Bar³,⁴ and an improved user experience. Now Bar conveniently puts the info you use the most - like weather, news and more - right on your main Watch screen
      • YOUR RUNNING GOALS, AT YOUR PACE: From a mile to a marathon, unleash the winning runner within using Running Coach.⁵ Your Watch analyzes factors⁶ such as your age, weight, oxygen levels and heart rate to guide you through your run
      • POWER FOR FAST-PACED LIFESTYLES: Your active lifestyle needs a watch that can keep up with you. Stay powered up and in charge with a battery that’s built for even your busiest days.⁷
      • BEAT BY BEAT, STAY ON TRACK: Gain deeper insight into your health with a watch that measures your vascular load.⁸ Galaxy Watch 8 Classic analyzes sleep, diet, activity and stress levels to keep you informed on the health of your heart and blood system
      • YOUR DAILY WELLNESS SNAPSHOT: Stay in the know about your wellness using Energy Score with Galaxy AI.⁹ It’s a score based off yesterday’s sleep, activity and heart rate¹⁰, all collected by your Galaxy Watch 8 Classic
      Show more
      › See more product details

      Product Description

      Galaxy Watch8 Classic is more than a watch —it’s an elegant timepiece with traditional style that helps keep your day on track.

      ¹Gemini mobile app available on select devices, languages, and countries. Requires compatible Wear OS watch to be connected to a compatible device. Check responses for accuracy. Internet connection and setup may be required. Features may differ depending on subscription and account. Results for illustrative purposes and may vary. Google and Gemini are trademarks of Google LLC. ²Galaxy AI features track data and require compatible Samsung Galaxy phone, Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ³Requires Wi-Fi connection and Samsung and Google accounts. Galaxy AI features track data and require a compatible Galaxy wearable device (sold separately), Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ⁴Must be signed into your Samsung and Google accounts, and be connected to the internet directly (by Wi-Fi or LTE model) or via a compatible Samsung Galaxy AI phone. ⁵Available for outdoor running only; requires at least 12 minutes of running with GPS on and initial setup. Galaxy AI features track data and require compatible Samsung Galaxy phone, Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ⁶Not intended for medical use. ⁷Based on typical use; results may vary. ⁸The Vascular Load software function is not intended for use in the diagnosis of disease or other conditions, or in the cure, mitigation, treatment or prevention of disease. Requires establishing your initial base line by wearing watch while sleeping for 3 nights (within a 2 week period). Not intended for medical use. ⁹Galaxy AI features track data and require a compatible Galaxy wearable device (sold separately), Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ¹⁰The heart rate software functions are not intended for use in the diagnosis of disease or other conditions, or in the cure, mitigation, treatment or prevention of disease.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Customers say

      Customers find the smartwatch's functionality positive, with one noting it's suitable for traditional watch enthusiasts. The battery life receives mixed feedback, with some customers reporting good performance while others find it lacking. Durability is also mixed, with one customer mentioning it lasts about 36 hours on heavy use. Compatibility is a concern, with multiple customers reporting connectivity issues with their carriers.

      Top reviews from the United States

      Translate all reviews to English

      There was a problem filtering reviews. Please reload the page.

      • Ray Bisczat
        5.0 out of 5 stars A Smartwatch for Traditional Watch Enthusiasts
        Reviewed in the United States on July 30, 2025
        Color: BlackSize: 46mmStyle: LTEPattern Name: Watch8 ClassicVerified Purchase
        I've had the watch for about a week, and I am impressed so far. I am a traditional watch guy and was skeptical about a smartwatch. The classic design makes this watch look more like a traditional dive watch vs. a piece of tech on your arm. My wife wanted me to have a smartwatch for health monitoring. This watch is perfect for that, a good combination of function and design. I really like the health and fitness features - my natural competitiveness is already motivating me to achieve better numbers all around. One watch-out, the full suite of health and fitness features require a Samsung phone - I got a new phone to support my new watch (with trade-in value it was not too bad a hit). I have to get used to charging the watch regularly which I don't have to do with a traditional watch - lunch time seems to be a good window for me. Overall, I am very happy with the watch.
        Read more
        9 people found this helpful
        Helpful
         Report
      • Amazon Customer
        5.0 out of 5 stars Nice smart watch, Verizon is being Verizon though
        Reviewed in the United States on July 30, 2025
        Color: BlackSize: 46mmStyle: LTEPattern Name: Watch8 ClassicVerified Purchase
        Cool watch. Loved the style and feel of watch but.....would not connect to Verizon network. Went to the local Verizon store with watch and they said I would have to buy watch from them for it to work on their network. Argh. Not Samsungs fault , however I wish they would work out a deal with Verizon so this doesn't happen.
        Read more
        2 people found this helpful
        Helpful
         Report
      • Tavi57
        1.0 out of 5 stars Face Lockdown!
        Reviewed in the United States on January 19, 2026
        Color: WhiteSize: 46mmStyle: LTEPattern Name: Watch8 ClassicVerified Purchase
        I purchased this watch as a it went into lockdown for 10 minutes! This happened 3 times making it useless. This watch is to expensive for this issue. So, I did research and found that this is a known issue with the watch 8 classic. I ended up giving them my watch Ultra until the new watch Ultra arrives. I will not recommend this watch 8 Classic for this reason.
        And I am a die-hard Samsung person. Heart breaking because it's a beautiful watch.
        Read more
        2 people found this helpful
        Helpful
         Report
      • Susan and Tim Fetters
        4.0 out of 5 stars The battery life isn't the greatest.
        Reviewed in the United States on October 8, 2025
        Color: WhiteSize: 46mmStyle: LTEPattern Name: Watch8 ClassicVerified Purchase
        I own several different Samsung products. The only thing I don't like on this watch would be the battery life. I charge it fully before work every day and by the time my workday is half over, the watch is almost dead. My old Samsung watch would last for 3 days before needing to be charged. This was my anniversary gift from my husband.
        Read more

      • Bob
        5.0 out of 5 stars If you use it right, its life changing.
        Reviewed in the United States on March 10, 2026
        Color: BlackSize: 46mmStyle: LTEPattern Name: Watch8 ClassicVerified Purchase
        Been wearing it for around nine months now and I love it, I use the fitness and sleep tracker religiously, and its been eye opening and life changing when hard metrics are staring you in face.

      • Osvaldo Soria
        3.0 out of 5 stars ¿Cuándo dará Samsung un verdaro salto de calidad en la duración de la batería?
        Reviewed in the United States on January 28, 2026
        Color: BlackSize: 46mmStyle: LTEPattern Name: Watch8 ClassicVerified Purchase
        Mi primer Samsung watch fue el S4, luego el 6, posteriormente compré el Ultra y ahora el 8 Classic. Son buenos productos y confío en ellos y en la calidad que propone l1allá de apreciar una mejora en los tiempos de procesamiento y de confiar en la marca en cuanto a la precisión de sus sensores de medición, el verdadero problema para mi es la duración de la batería. Considero que el verdadero cambio tecnológico que debe Samsung a sus usuarios no es seguir agregando colores o funciones, sino una batería que dure mas de 24 o 36 horas en uso normal.
        Read more
        One person found this helpful
        Helpful

        5.0 out of 5 stars Worthwhile if you want to track your health
        Reviewed in South Africa on March 14, 2026
        Color: BlackSize: 46mmStyle: LTEPattern Name: Watch8 ClassicVerified Purchase
        It's a worthwhile purchase, excellent health tracking features. It's basically like having your phone on your wrist. It's a bit chunky to sleep with but you get used to it. Battery lasts a day or so. That really needs to be improved.
